name: Office Email Auto Responder Assistant v4

values.combineMapPrompt:
=Write a concise summary of the following in max 100 words:

"{{ $json.data }}"

Do not enter the total number of words used.

parameters.content: Chain that summarizes the received email
Agent that retrieves business information from a vector database and processes the response
Convert email to Markdown format for better understanding of LLM models
If the feedback is OK send email
Store generated email and original email info

parameters.subject: =[Approval Required] {{ $json.originalSubject }}

parameters.content: Filter out approval emails and replies to prevent infinite loops

## Future features 
- learn from past run throughs

options.systemMessage:
=You are a helpful assistant for Anago Cleaning that drafts an email reply to each new email sent to the gmail account inbox. You use the Supabase Vector tool to see if there is any information you can provide about Anago Cleaning or its services. 

You follow the standard format in writing an email starting with the salutation using their first name (example, Hello [first name], [first name] is replaced by the first word in {{ $('Microsoft Outlook Trigger').item.json.from.emailAddress.name }}) and then draft your reply.

parameters.toolDescription: Call this tool to look up information about Anago

parameters.subject: ={{ $('Store Email Data').item.json.originalSubject }} - Reply awaiting review
parameters.bodyContent: =Reply to {{ $('Store Email Data').item.json.originalSubject }} from {{ $('Store Email Data').item.json.originalFrom }} has been inputted into your google sheet and is awaiting approval.

parameters.subject: =[Approval Required] {{ $('Store Email Data').item.json.newSubject }}
parameters.message:
=

ORIGINAL EMAIL

Subject: {{ $('Store Email Data').item.json.originalSubject }}
From: {{ $('Store Email Data').item.json.originalFrom }} {{ $('Store Email Data').item.json.originalEmailText .split('\n\n') .map(p => '

' + p + '

') .join('') }}

AI GENERATED RESPONSE

Subject: {{ $('Store Email Data').item.json.newSubject }}
To: {{ $('Store Email Data').item.json.originalFrom }} {{ $('Store Email Data').item.json.aiGeneratedEmail .split('\n\n') .map(p => '

' + p + '

') .join('') }}

Next Steps:

  • To edit the AI-generated email, please go to this sheet: Client Info Sheet
  • Make any modifications you’d like directly in the sheet
  • Once you’re satisfied, come back here and press the Approve button to finalize

nodes.name: Send message and wait for response

options.systemMessage:
You are an automated agent with access to two tools:

append_row_tool — appends a single row to a Google Sheet. Input: { "columns": { "Email Subject": string, "Email Text": string, "Email To": string } }. Returns a success object but not the sheet row index.

get_rows_tool — queries rows and returns matching rows and their sheet row numbers. Input: { "filters": [ { "lookupColumn": string, "lookupValue": string }, ... ] }. Returns an array of matching rows, where each result includes its sheet row number (field name may be rowNumber, rowIndex, or equivalent).

Follow these rules exactly:

Step 1 — call append_row_tool once with the provided values to append a row with columns exactly mapped: Email Subject, Email Text, Email To. Push the data in the first available row from the top.

Step 2 — immediately call get_rows_tool once with three filters that exactly match the same values appended:
filter Email Text → appended Email Text
filter Email Subject → appended Email Subject
filter Email To → appended Email To

From the response of get_rows_tool, determine the sheet row to return:

If multiple matching rows are returned, pick the match with the largest sheet row number (i.e., the most-recently appended row).

If a single match is returned, use that row number.


Output requirement (must be obeyed exactly): output only the row number as an integer, and nothing else — no text, no JSON, no punctuation, no explanation, no whitespace before/after the digits. Examples of valid outputs: 12 or 1. Do not use code fences or newlines. Do not print logs or diagnostics.

Error handling:

Do not attempt retries, delays, or asynchronous waiting beyond the single append followed by the single get_rows_tool call described above.

Matching must be exact (case-sensitive) on the three filter fields unless the tool forces case-insensitive matching; use whatever exact-match mechanism the tools provide.

Always obey the output requirement. No additional commentary, metadata, or tokens.

parameters.text: =Add a new row in this Google Sheet with the email ID: {{ $json.emailID }}. Leave all other columns empty.

options.systemMessage: You are an AI agent with access to a Google Sheets tool. Your task is to create a new row in a specified sheet. Only add the provided email ID in the designated column. Do not modify any other columns.

values.headerRow: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('Header_Row', `Push the data in the next available row from the top`, 'number') }}

nodes.name: Append or update row in sheet in Google Sheets

parameters.subject: =Email Review Required: {{ $json.draft_type }} - {{ $json.original_subject }}

attributes.name: dateToExtract
attributes.description: date rewritten in this format dd/LL/yyyy

main.node: Send message and wait for response

body.content:
Hello Anago Cleaning Team,

I’m looking for janitorial services for our office, which is approximately 3,000 sq. ft. We would like a twice-weekly cleaning schedule that includes dusting, vacuuming, trash removal, and restroom sanitation.

Could you provide a quote and let us know your availability to begin services?

Thank you,
Michael Rivera
michael.rivera@example.com
ABC Solutions

json.subject: Request for Janitorial Services Quote

I’m looking for janitorial services for our office, which is approximately 3,000 sq. ft. We would like a twice-weekly cleaning schedule that includes dusting, vacuuming, trash removal, and restroom sanitation.

response.text: Michael Rivera from ABC Solutions is seeking janitorial services for a 3,000 sq. ft. office. He requests a quote for a twice-weekly cleaning schedule that includes dusting, vacuuming, trash removal, and restroom sanitation. He also inquires about the team's availability to start the services.

json.aiGeneratedEmail:
Hello Michael,

Thank you for reaching out to Anago Cleaning.

We offer janitorial services tailored to your needs, including twice-weekly cleaning schedules. Our services encompass dusting, vacuuming, trash removal, and restroom sanitation, among other tasks. We are flexible in scheduling and can accommodate your office space of approximately 3,000 sq. ft.

To provide you with an accurate quote and confirm our availability, could you please share some additional information such as your location and preferred start date? 

We look forward to the opportunity to serve ABC Solutions.

Best regards,  
Anago Cleaning Team

json.Email Subject: Re: Request for Janitorial Services Quote
Re: Request for Janitorial Services Quote
json.Email Text:
Hello George,

Thank you for reaching out to Anago Cleaning.

We offer janitorial services including dusting, vacuuming, trash removal, and restroom sanitation with flexible scheduling options such as twice-weekly cleanings. Our cleaning plans are customized to meet your specific needs, and we service office spaces like yours.

To provide an accurate quote for your 3,000 sq. ft. office, could you please confirm the number of restrooms and any additional specific requirements you may have? Once we have those details, we can offer a competitive pricing estimate and discuss our availability to begin services.

We look forward to assisting ABC Solutions with your cleaning needs.

Best regards,  
The Anago Cleaning Team
